heading: Measured. Modelled. Built.
lede: From GPS machine control to underwater ROVs, we run a technology stack few contractors in the country can match. Not for show: it works on every Pittmans site, every day.

rows.name: GPS Machine Control
rows.desc: Excavators and dozers cut directly to the 3D design surface. No stakes, no rework, no waiting on grade checks.

rows.name: Robotic Total Station
rows.desc: Millimetre layout and as-built verification on structures, wharves, and steel. Survey-grade control, one operator.

rows.name: Autonomous Marine Survey Vessel
rows.desc: Unmanned hydrographic survey of seabeds, channels, and berths. Dredge volumes and clearances measured, not estimated.

rows.name: Underwater ROV
rows.desc: Subsea inspection of piles, cribwork, and structures without putting divers in the water. Video record before, during, and after.

rows.name: Drone Photogrammetry
rows.desc: Site-wide topography and volumetrics in hours, not weeks. Progress mapped and quantities proven every cycle.

rows.name: 3D & Dynamic Structural Modelling
rows.desc: Constructability, clash detection, and load behaviour modelled before mobilization. Problems get solved on screen, not on your schedule.
